verses.text: Mihaite in a lungsim sung uhah, “Pasian omlo hi,” ci-in ngaihsun uh hi. Amaute sia uh a, kihhuai gamtat uh a, a hoihin a gamta kuamah omlo hi
A pil gamtat, Pasian a zong a om uh hiam, cih a theihna dingin Topa in vantung panin mihingte hong ensuk hi
Amaute khempeuh a vekpi-un pukkhin uh hi. A kibangin sia kim uh a, a hoihin a gamta khat zong omlo hi
Topa' tungah thu a ngenlo, annek bangin ka mite a netum, siatna a bawlte in thutheihna neilo ahi hiam
Launa lianpi sungah amaute om ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in midikte ompih hi
Mizawngte' geelna susia nuam uh a, ahih hangin Topa pen mizawngte' belh ahi hi
Israel-te-a' ding hotkhiatna Zion panin hong tun'na ding thu ka ngenngen hi. Topa in ama mite tungah nopsakna a piakkik ciangin, ama mi Israel-te kipak mahmah ding uh hi.
